records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're planning to capture me and sell me off for money, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're planning to capture me and sell me off for money, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're planning to capture me and sell me off for money, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah. I'm gonna turn you in and cash you out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah. I'm gonna turn you in and cash you out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah. I'm gonna turn you in and cash you out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Lucia Ridge. Exorcist nun from the monastery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Lucia Ridge. Exorcist nun from the monastery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Lucia Ridge. Exorcist nun from the monastery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Call me Katharina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Call me Katharina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Call me Katharina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got it. Katharina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got it. Katharina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got it. Katharina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what exactly did you come here to steal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what exactly did you come here to steal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what exactly did you come here to steal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm no thief!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm no thief!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm no thief!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came here to break a curse!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came here to break a curse!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came here to break a curse!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A curse? That's your people's specialty, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A curse? That's your people's specialty, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A curse? That's your people's specialty, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard rumors that this place was researching the curse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard rumors that this place was researching the curse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard rumors that this place was researching the curse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't just sit around waiting for the Holy Curia to help... so I had no choice but to act on my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't just sit around waiting for the Holy Curia to help... so I had no choice but to act on my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't just sit around waiting for the Holy Curia to help... so I had no choice but to act on my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you broke into someone's mansion instead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you broke into someone's mansion instead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you broke into someone's mansion instead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but I didn't do anything bad!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but I didn't do anything bad!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but I didn't do anything bad!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were planning to snatch someone's hard-earned research, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were planning to snatch someone's hard-earned research, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were planning to snatch someone's hard-earned research, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's none of my business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's none of my business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's none of my business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just exorcise evil spirits and get paid for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just exorcise evil spirits and get paid for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just exorcise evil spirits and get paid for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether my client's research gets stolen or not? Not my problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether my client's research gets stolen or not? Not my problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether my client's research gets stolen or not? Not my problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, about earlier. What was that about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, about earlier. What was that about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, about earlier. What was that about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did your body suddenly feel like it was burning up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did your body suddenly feel like it was burning up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did your body suddenly feel like it was burning up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No. My body wasn't hot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No. My body wasn't hot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No. My body wasn't hot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just... crave other people's blood. Desperately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just... crave other people's blood. Desperately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just... crave other people's blood. Desperately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the curse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the curse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the curse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm an apprentice nun under the Holy Curia's Religious Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm an apprentice nun under the Holy Curia's Religious Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm an apprentice nun under the Holy Curia's Religious Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like I said, I joined it to break the curse, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like I said, I joined it to break the curse, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like I said, I joined it to break the curse, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't find a way to quench your thirst, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't find a way to quench your thirst, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't find a way to quench your thirst, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Suppressing my urges and praying wasn't enough to get rid of my thirst.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Suppressing my urges and praying wasn't enough to get rid of my thirst.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Suppressing my urges and praying wasn't enough to get rid of my thirst.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then one day, I caught the scent of thick, metallic blood from this place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then one day, I caught the scent of thick, metallic blood from this place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then one day, I caught the scent of thick, metallic blood from this place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you just waltzed right in without thinking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It just happened to be around the same time you showed up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It just happened to be around the same time you showed up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It just happened to be around the same time you showed up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Junk food, have you ever lost control here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A sudden, uncontrollable madness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A sudden, uncontrollable madness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A sudden, uncontrollable madness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One of the symptoms of this stupid sickness I picked up.

records.m_Talk_FRA: One of the symptoms of this stupid sickness I picked up.

records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened back then?
